profile.title: Profile
profile.personalDetailsDesc: Manage your personal information & contact details.
profile.passwordDesc: Strengthen your account by ensuring your password is strong.
profile.passwordHint: Password must be at least 6 characters and include at least one uppercase letter, number, or special character.
profile.socialPasswordDescription: Your account is currently accessed via social login. Set a password to enable sign in using your email and password.
profile.forgotPasswordCheckEmailDescription: Check your email for a link to reset your password. If it doesn't appear within a few minutes, check your spam folder.
profile.forgotPasswordRequestFailedTitle: We couldn't send the reset email
profile.forgotPasswordRequestFailed: Unable to send a reset link right now. Please try again in a moment.
profile.settingsDesc: Manage your account preferences, including promotion and discount alerts, as well as your review settings.
profile.promotionsDesc: Receive emails about savings, new items, promotions & more.
profile.reviewsDesc: Receive emails everytime your order gets completed, as well as published reviews.
profile.confirmationsDesc: Receive emails regarding final proof, design changes and payment proof.
profile.unitDesc: Choose your preferred/default unit of measurement.
profile.socialLoginLinked: This account is linked to your {provider} login.

emailChange.title: Email Change
emailChange.description: Enter your new email address and click the "Confirm" button to proceed.
emailChange.placeholder: Please enter your new email address.
emailChange.enterNewEmail: Please enter your new email address.
emailChange.verifyingDescription: Just a moment! We're making sure everything looks perfect.

profile.photoDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this photo?
